map into owned workflow_orchestrator and task_state
what_must_not_be_lost: do not lose code editing and workspace reasoning patterns
do not lose tool schema and invocation contract ideas
do not lose state machine and dependency execution logic
do not lose local/offline model operation assumptions
do not lose prompt template and skill instruction structure
do not lose safety gate and audit policy
